Tufte theme for highcharts

Source: R/theme-tufte.R
hc_theme_tufte.Rd

Tufte theme for highcharts

Usage

hc_theme_tufte(...)

Arguments

...

A named parameters to modify the theme.

Examples


n <- 15

dta <- data.frame(
  x = 1:n + rnorm(n),
  y = 2 * 1:n + rnorm(n)
)

highchart() |>
  hc_chart(type = "scatter") |>
  hc_add_series(data = list_parse(dta), showInLegend = FALSE) |>
  hc_add_theme(hc_theme_tufte())
